html:
Exclusive to:

“A temporary solution for leaks. Sprung a leak? Use a kelp patch... then another... and another...”

-

The Kelp Patch is an item that can be used to plug Leaks temporarily. On small Leaks it will last 6 minutes; on medium leaks it will last 4 minutes, after which the Kelp Patch breaks. Every collision a boat receives can also destroy Kelp Patches. It can also be used as food or fire fuel.

DSTDSRoGSWHam

"Keep your boat afloat... for a while, anyway."

Miscellaneous
"boatpatch_kelp"
“It'll have to do for now.”
–Wilson
“At least it'll keep the water out for a bit.”
–Willow
“Hm. Slimy patch is not very strong, but will do for now.”
–Wolfgang
“It will probably fall apart before I can reach shore. If I'm lucky.”
–Wendy
“I SEE. BOATS CAN GET WORSE”
–WX-78
“A temporary solution, but better than nothing.”
–Wickerbottom
“Not nearly as dependable as wood, but it'll do in a pinch.”
–Woodie
“That won't keep the water at bay for long.”
–Maxwell
“It shall höld för nöw.”
–Wigfrid
“It's for fixing up boat booboos!”
–Webber
“That should hold us over for now.”
–Warly
“Thanks friends!”
–Wormwood
“Just a quick fix until I can do some proper repairs.”
–Winona
“This kelp should help!”
–Wortox
“Maybe fix boat for now, be snack for later?”
–Wurt
“I knew it was a good idea to pick all that kelp!”
–Walter
“That won't hold forever...”
–Wanda
“A temporary solution for leaks. Sprung a leak? Use a kelp patch... then another... and another...”
-
The Kelp Patch is an item that can be used to plug Leaks temporarily. On small Leaks it will last 6 minutes; on medium leaks it will last 4 minutes, after which the Kelp Patch breaks. Every collision a boat receives can also destroy Kelp Patches. It can also be used as food or fire fuel.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tấm dán Tảo bẹ là một vật phẩm có thể dùng để tạm thời bịt Rò rỉ. Ở những Rò rỉ nhỏ, nó sẽ kéo dài 6 phút; ở mức độ rò rỉ trung bình, nó sẽ tồn tại trong 4 phút, sau đó Bản vá tảo bẹ sẽ bị hỏng. Mỗi vụ va chạm mà thuyền gặp phải cũng có thể phá hủy Kelp Patches. Nó cũng có thể được sử dụng làm thực phẩm hoặc nhiên liệu chữa cháy.
title: Kelp Patch

The '''Kelp Patch''' is an item that can be used to plug [[Leak]]s temporarily. On small Leaks it will last 6 minutes; on medium leaks it will last 4 minutes, after which the Kelp Patch breaks. Every collision a boat receives can also destroy Kelp Patches. It can also be used as food or fire fuel.
